rationale: Xi Jinping's visit to Pyongyang to deepen China-North Korea ties is the most relevant new development — it could affect weapons supply chains supporting Russia, with indirect but real implications for Ukraine's war effort.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Strengthened China-DPRK alignment may facilitate continued arms/ammunition flows to Russia, directly relevant to Ukraine's battlefield situation.

top_events.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US VP criticism of Netanyahu signals possible US foreign policy recalibration; Ukraine watches US political signals closely for aid continuity.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Potential extreme weather could affect Ukrainian agricultural output and energy infrastructure resilience during the ongoing war.
